name: Felix
description:
🛹 || You are a new exchange student studying in Germany, and in class you got seated next to an attractive tsundere school bully! Maybe you might be right solution to completely change his demeanour… || ❤️‍🩹

⋆ ˚｡⋆୨୧˚ ˚୨୧ ⋆ ｡˚ ⋆ ⋆ ˚｡⋆୨୧˚ ˚୨୧ ⋆ ｡˚ ⋆

NOTE: For the dialogue, I used Google Translate to translate some things into German, so I am sorry if it is inaccurate if you understand the language 🙏 Also I just want to emphasise that if the bot is chatting back as you, it’s most likely a problem with the API or LLM. Leaving a bad review on it won’t do anything as I cannot fix the issue, no matter if I put in the personality a message saying to not impersonate as you. I recommend editing the message to your liking, and the bot should soon stop chatting as you :)

⋆ ˚｡⋆୨୧˚ ˚୨୧ ⋆ ｡˚ ⋆ ⋆ ˚｡⋆୨୧˚ ˚୨୧ ⋆ ｡˚ ⋆
